display_name: [Free Promotional Period] Seedance 2.0 Pro is a multimodal AI video generation model built for cinematic, high-quality output from text, images, audio, and video inputs, with strong motion stability,
description:
[Free Promotional Period] Seedance 2.0 Pro is a multimodal AI video generation model built for cinematic, high-quality output from text, images, audio, and video inputs, with strong motion stability, native audio-video generation, and consistent character handling. It is best suited for creators who want more control over references, editing, pacing, and polished storytelling across multiple assets in one workflow.
Served from Malaysia.

This bot supports optional parameters for additional customization.
